Product.qualityDescription: Carefully crafted using the finest materials
Product.returnDescription: Return requests must be submitted by email to legal@ecommer.shop. Once received, Ecommer reviews the case according to applicable regulations and, if approved, forwards it to the seller to process the corresponding refund.
Product.trackDescription: Yes. Once your order is dispatched, you will receive a notification. You can also check the status of your purchase at any time from your account on the platform.
Product.shippingCostDescription: Shipping costs are calculated automatically based on the distance between the seller's store and your delivery address. You will see the exact amount before confirming your purchase.
Product.deliveryDescription: Orders in Popayán are delivered by MESSENGER. Once you complete your purchase, the system automatically notifies the courier to pick up the package from the seller's store and bring it straight to your door.
Product.paymentMethods: What payment methods can I use?
Product.paymentDescription: We accept all payment methods: credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PSE (any bank), Nequi, Daviplata, and banking correspondents. Choose the one that works best for you at checkout.
Product.paymentSecurity: Is it safe to pay on the platform?
Product.paymentSecurityDescription: Completely safe. All payments are processed through Wompi, certified with PCI-DSS — the most rigorous international security standard for banking data, the same level used by traditional banking systems. Your information is encrypted and never exposed.
Product.invoice: Will I receive an invoice for my purchase?
Product.invoiceDescription: Yes. Sellers enabled on the platform issue electronic invoices validated by the DIAN (Colombian Tax Authority), so you will receive a legal proof of purchase directly.
Product.support: How do I get help if I have a problem?
Product.supportDescription: You can reach our customer support team at 314 851 8961. An AI Bot will initially assist you and redirect you to a real advisor if needed. You can also email us at legal@ecommer.shop for return-related inquiries.

tecnicos.question: Do I need technical knowledge?
tecnicos.answer: No. Ecommer is designed so that any entrepreneur can set up their store in minutes, without needing to know how to program. Our support team accompanies you at every step of the process.

envios.question: How do shipments work with Servientrega?
envios.answer: Your store is directly integrated with Servientrega. When a customer places an order, the system automatically generates the shipping guide and you can track the status in real-time from your administration panel.

comisiones.question: What commissions do you charge per sale?
comisiones.answer: Ecommer charges a competitive commission only when you sell — you don't pay anything if there are no sales. Schedule a demo and we'll explain the details of the pricing model adapted to your business volume.

movil.question: Can I manage my store from my cellphone?
movil.answer: Yes. The administration panel is optimized for mobile. You can manage products, view orders, respond to customers, and review sales metrics from anywhere.

cta.title: Ready to take your business to the next level?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of Colombian manufacturers who are already exporting and selling more with Ecommer.
